PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-13-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PURE LUXURY LIMOUSINE SERVICE
